image.title: Image Generation
image.effect: Turns rough image ideas into detailed prompts with subject, composition, lighting, style, camera, aspect ratio, and constraints.

copy.title: Copywriting
copy.effect: Turns a vague copy request into a clear brief with audience, offer, tone, proof points, objections, and output format.

code.title: Code Generation
code.effect: Turns programming requests into implementation-ready prompts with context, constraints, edge cases, files, and verification steps.

roleplay.title: Role Play
roleplay.effect: Turns persona ideas into reliable role instructions with scope, behavior rules, boundaries, and response style.

data.title: Data Analysis
data.effect: Turns analysis ideas into structured prompts with data context, assumptions, methods, outputs, and quality checks.

general.title: General Improve
general.effect: Turns a rough instruction into a clearer prompt with role, task, context, constraints, and output format.

bazi.title: Full Bazi Reading
bazi.description: Chart, structure, useful element, and preference analysis
bazi.effect: Gives a broad BaZi reading across chart structure, useful elements, ten gods, major luck cycles, and overall direction.

annual.title: Annual Luck
annual.description: This year's luck and near-term direction
annual.effect: Focuses the reading on this year's flow, key months, near-term opportunities, and periods that need caution.

relationship.title: Relationship
relationship.effect: Focuses the reading on romance timing, marriage tendencies, partner traits, and relationship risks.

career.title: Career
career.description: Career direction, promotion, and suitable industries
career.effect: Focuses the reading on career direction, suitable industries, promotion timing, and workplace risks.

wealth.title: Wealth
wealth.effect: Focuses the reading on income, windfall tendencies, investment caution, money timing, and wealth retention.

health.title: Health
health.effect: Focuses the reading on elemental balance, health cautions, wellness direction, and years that need extra care.

personality.title: Personality
personality.effect: Focuses the reading on personality traits, natural strengths, blind spots, talents, and interpersonal patterns.

family.title: Family
family.effect: Focuses the reading on family relationships, parent and sibling affinity, child-related luck, and household harmony.

deai.title: Humanize
deai.placeholder: Paste text that should sound less AI-generated...

academic.title: Academic Paper
academic.description: Reduce repetition and make academic writing more natural
academic.effect: Makes academic writing more natural while preserving rigor, terminology, citations, and logical structure.

business.title: Business Copy
business.description: Make marketing copy sound more natural
business.effect: Makes business copy sound more credible, direct, and specific without hype or generic marketing language.

news.title: News Article
news.description: Convert text into a newsroom style
news.effect: Makes article-style writing more factual, concise, and editorial while avoiding robotic phrasing.

social.title: Social Post
social.effect: Makes social posts feel conversational, clear, and natural while keeping the user's point intact.

email.title: Email
email.effect: Makes emails clearer, warmer, and more respectful without sounding overly formal or robotic.

creative.title: Creative Writing
creative.effect: Makes creative writing more vivid and human while preserving voice, rhythm, and emotional intent.
